ddls:
CREATE TABLE "racial_compositions" (
  "racial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racial composition */,
  "composition" TEXT /* Name of the racial composition (e.g., Black or African American alone) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the racial composition */,
  "race_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the racial composition belongs */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the racial composition data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the racial composition data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("racial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_racial_compositions_race_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_category_id") REFERENCES race_categories ("race_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "racial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the racial composition */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the racial composition in the total population */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population for the specified year and region */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data point */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_racial_id FOREIGN KEY ("racial_id") REFERENCES racial_compositions ("racial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the year is the most recent year for which data is available */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the year data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region's centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region's centroid */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the region data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data collection */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population for the specified year and region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the user accessed the system */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, query) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_categories" (
  "race_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the race category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the race category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_category_id")
)
